restaurant_openings.name: A New Izakaya From Kiko Lands in Soho
restaurant_openings.summary: After earning two stars from the New York Times for the Asian American fare at Kiko, husband-wife team Lina Goujjane and Alex Chang are opening a second restaurant nearby. Noury is their new Japanese-leaning wine and sake bar opening in Soho at 137 Sullivan Street, at Prince Street, on Thursday, June 25. The restaurant takes […]

restaurant_openings.name: This New West Village Seafood Tavern Debuts With a Caviar Sandwich
restaurant_openings.summary: Capitaine, the new restaurant and bar from the duo behind Chateau Royale, opens in the West Village at 684 Greenwich Street, at Christopher Street, Friday, June 19. Cody Pruitt and Jacob Cohen swapped their prior restaurant, Libertine, with a seafood tavern, in a shift away from Libertine’s French bistro fare. The change tracks with Pruitt’s […]

restaurant_openings.name: The $9 Martini Spot Has Opened in Nolita
restaurant_openings.summary: This is Eater’s guide to all the new restaurants, bars, and cafes that have opened this week in June 2026. Throughout the month, we’ll update the list weekly (see: May, April, March, February, January). When we’ve been to a place, we will then include a few openings on our heatmaps (Manhattan, Brooklyn, Queens, cocktail bars) […]

restaurant_openings.name: Two NYC Powerhouses Team Up for Mexican Food and Drinks in Dumbo
restaurant_openings.summary: What happens when two New York City powerhouses — one who runs Los Burritos Juárez, one of the hottest North Mexican-style burrito joints in Brooklyn, and the other a James Beard Awards finalist behind Whoopsie Daisy — team up as co-partners to open a new restaurant and bar exploring Northern Mexican cuisines and drinks? You […]

restaurant_openings.name: A Massive Korean Barbecue Restaurant Opens on the Williamsburg Waterfront
restaurant_openings.summary: Williamsburg has its share of Korean fried chicken counters and casual comfort food spots, but it hasn’t had a sleek destination with outsized ambition — until now. Lalaon opens on Wednesday, June 17, at 22 North Sixth Street, at Kent Avenue, bringing more than 300 seats to the Williamsburg waterfront. Owners Ju Young Oh and […]

restaurant_openings.name: Eddie Huang’s Fiction Debut Is a Rom-Com About Two People Who Are Bad at Love
restaurant_openings.summary: Eddie Huang has a lot going on. This past spring, he reopened Baohaus on St. Marks Place, and it subsequently became an unofficial Knicks playoff headquarters. He has a podcast, Canal Street Dreams, and a Substack. And today, Tuesday, June 16, Come Undone, his fiction book debut, publishes. He wrote the final version of the […]

restaurant_openings.name: Claudette’s Second Act
restaurant_openings.summary: The chef Igor Almeida Cabral breathes new life into this bistro, a very large venue for Korean barbecue opens in Williamsburg, Brooklyn, and more restaurant news.
